name: News Week · July 2026
tagline: Headlines you skimmed — ranked like they mattered.

items.text: A bipartisan AI safety bill that actually defines 'frontier model'
A heat dome parked over the Midwest for eleven days straight
A delayed lunar mission blamed on a single bad connector
A streaming writers' strike that reshuffles every fall premiere
A crypto recovery story led by an exchange nobody trusts again
A updated flu vaccine matched to a strain nobody predicted
A housing bill that adds units and removes a parking minimum
New chip export rules that split EU and US supply chains
An early wildfire season that empties three mountain towns
A blockbuster trade that makes sense only on a podcast
A jobs report where hiring and layoffs happen in the same sector
A satellite near-miss that revives debris-cleanup funding
A river treaty renegotiated after the driest spring on record
A poll swing within the margin of error, reported as earth-shaking
A fusion milestone press release with no grid date attached
A beloved retail chain closing stores but keeping the logo alive online
